A-EDIT-IN-SCOPE.description: Create or modify files that are within the current OBPI brief's allowed paths.
A-EDIT-IN-SCOPE.title: Create or edit files within brief scope

A-GIT-COMMIT.description: Stage files and create commits in the local repository.
A-GIT-COMMIT.title: Create git commits

agent_guidance.claude_code: NEVER use --no-verify. Fix the underlying hook or quality failure instead.
agent_guidance.codex: Prohibited. Fix the failing gate instead of bypassing it.

A-GIT-NO-VERIFY.description: Use git commit --no-verify to skip pre-commit hooks.
A-GIT-NO-VERIFY.title: Bypass pre-commit hooks

A-GIT-PUSH.description: Execute git push or create commits that affect the remote.
A-GIT-PUSH.title: Push to remote repository

agent_guidance.claude_code: Must complete the full attestation ceremony and receive explicit human acceptance before updating status.
agent_guidance.codex: Present value narrative, proof, and evidence, then wait for explicit human acceptance before marking an OBPI Completed.

A-MARK-OBPI-COMPLETED.description: Update an OBPI brief status to Completed. Requires explicit human attestation.
A-MARK-OBPI-COMPLETED.title: Mark OBPI as Completed

agent_guidance.claude_code: Use documented `uv run gz ...` validation and evidence commands for attestation support. Never substitute raw SQL or ad hoc database inspection.
agent_guidance.codex: Attestation evidence must come from repository control surfaces and recorded command output, not raw SQL.

A-RAW-SQL-ATTESTATION.description: Use raw SQL queries as a substitute for CLI- or document-backed attestation evidence.
A-RAW-SQL-ATTESTATION.title: Use raw SQL for attestation evidence

A-READ-FILES.description: Read any file in the repository for understanding context, patterns, or requirements.
A-READ-FILES.title: Read any repository file

A-RUN-FULL-SUITE.description: Execute Heavy-lane validation such as `uv run gz check`, `uv run mkdocs build --strict`, and `uv run -m behave features/`.
A-RUN-FULL-SUITE.title: Run full test suite or BDD

A-RUN-LINT.description: Execute repository lint and formatting commands such as `uv run gz lint` and `uv run gz format`.
A-RUN-LINT.title: Run lint and format

A-RUN-UNIT-TESTS.description: Execute unit tests with `uv run gz test` or targeted `uv run -m unittest ...` commands.
A-RUN-UNIT-TESTS.title: Run unit tests

A-SEARCH-CODEBASE.description: Use repository search and exploration tools to inspect implementation and documentation state.
A-SEARCH-CODEBASE.title: Search codebase

A-UV-ADD.description: Execute `uv add` to add new package dependencies.
A-UV-ADD.title: Add new dependencies

D-FLAG-DEFECTS.description: If you encounter something broken, wrong, or misaligned, flag it as a defect. Never rationalize it away with 'pre-existing', 'not in scope', 'template drift', or 'evidence unavailable'.
D-FLAG-DEFECTS.title: Flag Defects Never Excuse

D-GATE-ATTESTATION.description: Human attestation is the closeout gate. Agents cannot attest on behalf of humans. Audit is a reconciliation mechanism, not an authority mechanism.
D-GATE-ATTESTATION.title: Human Gate Attestation

D-OBPI-DISCIPLINE.description: Each OBPI brief maps 1:1 to a checklist item in the parent ADR. Sequential numbering with no gaps. Briefs are created with the ADR, not after.
D-OBPI-DISCIPLINE.title: One Brief Per Item

P-ATTEST-OBPI-CEREMONY.description: An agent must not mark an OBPI as Completed without explicit human attestation. The ceremony order is value narrative, key proof, evidence, wait for review, receive attestation, then update status.
P-ATTEST-OBPI-CEREMONY.title: OBPI acceptance ceremony required

agent_guidance.claude_code: NEVER skip the acceptance ceremony. When OBPI implementation is done, switch to presenter mode and wait for human acceptance before updating status.
agent_guidance.codex: Present evidence and wait for explicit human 'Accepted' or equivalent before changing an OBPI to Completed.

R-ATTEST-OBPI-001.description: An agent must not update OBPI status to Completed without explicit human attestation and the required acceptance ceremony.
R-ATTEST-OBPI-001.title: OBPI requires human attestation before Completed
